DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS DIM_GEOGRAPHY CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE DIM_GEOGRAPHY (
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	STATE VARCHAR(50),
	DISTRICT VARCHAR(50),
	PSU_VILLAGE_OR_NEIGHBORHOOD_CODE BIGINT,
	UNIQUE_PSU_ID_CLUSTER BIGINT,
	HOUSEHOLD_ID_3_DIGIT BIGINT,
	SPLIT_HOUSEHOLD_ID BIGINT,
	UNIQUE_HOUSEHOLD_ID BIGINT
);

description: Detailed business operations with complete expense breakdown (Business 1)
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_BUSINESS_TYPE_A CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_BUSINESS_TYPE_A (
	BUSINESS_TYPE_A_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT,
	GROSS_RECEIPTS_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PAID_WORKERS_COST_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	RAW_MATERIALS_AND_INPUTS_COST_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	OTHER_COSTS_INCLUDING_TAXES_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	TOTAL_EXPENSES_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NET_INCOME_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	INVESTMENTS_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	TOTAL_LOSS_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FOREIGN KEY (GEOGRAPHY_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY (GEOGRAPHY_ID)
);

description: Household consumption, debt, and credit metrics

DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_CEREMONIAL_EXPENSES CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_CEREMONIAL_EXPENSES (
	CEREMONIAL_EXPENSES_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT,
	BOYS_FAMILY_WEDDING_EXPENSE_LOW_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	BOYS_FAMILY_WEDDING_EXPENSE_HIGH_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	GIRLS_FAMILY_WEDDING_EXPENSE_LOW_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	GIRLS_FAMILY_WEDDING_EXPENSE_HIGH_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	COMMUNITY_WEDDING_CASH_GIFT_LOW_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	COMMUNITY_WEDDING_CASH_GIFT_HIGH_RUPEES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FOREIGN KEY (GEOGRAPHY_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY (GEOGRAPHY_ID)
